description: pre-mRNA splicing tri-snRNP complex factor PRPF4 [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:17349]
ciliary_role: PRPF3, PRPF4, PRPF6, PRPF8, PRPF31, and SNRNP200, are mutated in autosomal dominant retinitis pigmentosa (adRP). These proteins have been shown to localize to the base of the connecting cilium of the retinal photoreceptor cells, elucidating this form of RP as a retinal ciliopathy(PMID: 30967900).

ai_summary.basic_summary: PRPF4 is a ciliary gene encoding pre-mrna splicing tri-snrnp complex factor prpf4 [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:17349]
